The habit app where quitting doesn't just affect only you

Pair with an accountability partner or join a group. If one person breaks the streak, everyone feels it. Real social cost creates real motivation.

Free forever. No credit card required.

🔥
12 day streak Partner completed today
The Real Problem

You don't fail because you lack tools. You fail because you're alone.

Reminders you ignore

Notifications become noise. There is no consequence for swiping them away.

Streaks nobody sees

Breaking a private streak costs nothing. There is no social weight to letting yourself down.

Easy to skip

When the only person you let down is yourself, skipping becomes painless.

Goals that fade

Without external accountability, motivation fades after the first week.

TinyAct changes the equation:

When your partner's streak depends on you, skipping is not an option.

What Makes TinyAct Different

Two powerful ways to stay accountable

Choose partner mode for one-on-one commitment, or group mode for team-based accountability. Both create real social cost when you skip.

2 Partner Mode

Linked Streaks

Pair with one accountability partner. Your streaks are connected - if one breaks, both restart at zero.

Y
You Done today
S
Sarah Done today
21 day streak together
  • If one person misses, both streaks reset
  • Real-time notifications when partner checks in
  • Share reactions to celebrate each other
8 Group Mode

All-Members Accountability

Join a group of up to 8 members. Enable "All Accountable" mode - one person misses, everyone's streak resets.

Y
M
J
K
+2
Morning Workout Crew
4 of 6 checked in today
14 day group streak
  • Teams of 3-8 people for maximum accountability
  • Optional: All Members Accountable mode
  • Live activity feed within the group

Built on behavioral science

Research shows we're 65% more likely to achieve goals when we commit to another person, and 95% more likely when we have regular accountability meetings. TinyAct automates this with daily check-ins and real consequences for missing.

How It Works

Start building real habits in 3 steps

Simple setup. Powerful accountability. Results that last.

1

Create a micro-commitment

Pick something so small you can't say no. 10 pushups. 5 minutes reading. One glass of water. Set a time-box: 7, 14, 21, or 30 days.

10 pushups before 9am
2

Add accountability

Invite a partner or create a group. Enable "All Accountable" mode so everyone's streak depends on everyone checking in.

Y
M
S
Your accountability team
3

Check in daily

Tap to log your completion. Optional photo proof with watermarks. Build your streak. Your partner gets notified when you complete.

Done
Takes 5 seconds

Time-boxed commitments

7, 14, 21, or 30 days. Finite feels achievable. Renew if you want to continue.

Smart nudges

Get reminded when your partner completes. Notifications timed to your preferred time.

Streak protection

Pause for illness or travel. 4-hour grace period after midnight. Life happens.

Features

Everything you need to stay consistent

Simple, powerful tools designed around one goal: keeping you accountable.

Partner & Group Accountability

Pair with one partner or join a group of up to 8. Enable "All Accountable" mode where one miss resets everyone. Real social cost, real motivation.

  • Partner mode: linked streaks
  • Group mode: team accountability
  • All Members Accountable option

Photo Proof Check-ins

Capture proof of completion with automatic watermarks showing date, time, and streak count. Or use honor-based check-ins for privacy. Your choice.

  • Auto-watermarked photos
  • Encrypted and private
  • Honor-based option

Micro-Commitments

Set tiny, specific goals like "10 pushups before 9am" or "read 10 pages." Small wins compound.

Time-Boxed Goals

Choose 7, 14, 21, or 30 days. Finite feels achievable. Renew to continue.

Live Activity Feed

See others complete in real-time. Their momentum becomes your motivation.

Smart Nudges

Get notified when your partner checks in. Reminders at your preferred time.

Streak Tracking

Build and maintain streaks. Pause for illness or travel. 4-hour grace period.

Reactions

Send quick reactions to celebrate completions. No awkward comments needed.

18 Awards

Unlock achievements across 5 categories: Streaks, Comebacks, Consistency, Social, Proof.

Comeback Tracking

Missed a few days? Track your comebacks. Rise stronger after breaks.

iOS Widgets

Track progress right from your home screen. Small, medium, and large widgets.

XP & Levels

Earn experience points for check-ins, reactions, and achievements. Level up over time.

iOS Widgets

Your habits, always visible

Beautiful widgets that keep your goals front and center on your home screen.

day streak
Done today

Medium Widget

Tap any widget to check in instantly. No need to open the app.

Real Results

What accountability looks like in practice

The science and features behind building lasting habits.

65% more likely to complete goals with a partner
21 days to form a lasting habit
4h grace period so life doesn't ruin your streak

Your data stays private

We built TinyAct with privacy at the core. Your habit data is yours alone.

End-to-end encryption

Photo proofs are encrypted with AES-256-GCM before they leave your device. Only you and your partners can view them.

No selling your data

We don't sell your data to advertisers or third parties. Your habits are not our product.

Minimal data collection

We only collect what's needed to make the app work. No tracking, no profiling, no hidden analytics.

Delete anytime

Request full data deletion at any time. We remove everything, no questions asked.

Stop trying to build habits alone

Download TinyAct and pair with someone who'll hold you accountable. When their streak depends on you, showing up becomes automatic.
